title: Salary or wages
description: See what is included in income from salary or wages.

content_blocks.text: This section is about income from salary or wages from which tax was withheld. Income from salary or wages includes:

items: income from part-time or casual work
amounts for lost salary or wages paid under an income protection policy a sickness or accident insurance policy a workers compensation scheme.

content_text:
This section is about income from salary or wages from which tax was withheld. Income from salary or wages includes:
- salary and wages
- commissions
- bonuses
- income from part-time or casual work
- parental leave pay
- dad-and-partner pay
- amounts for lost salary or wages paid under an income protection policy a sickness or accident insurance policy a workers compensation scheme.
